---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, behaviour change, or scope addition for ClaudeLander.
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thanks for proposing a feature.  ClaudeLander follows a gate-driven
  pipeline; the more concrete you make this request, the faster the
  planner gate can convert it into acceptance criteria.
-->

## Motivation (REQUIRED)

<!--
  Why does this feature need to exist?  What problem does it solve, or
  what behaviour from the original Lander (Acorn Archimedes, 1987) is it
  faithful to?  Link any reference material -- e.g. a specific page on
  lander.bbcelite.com -- so the clean-room boundary is documented.
-->

## Proposed behaviour (REQUIRED)

<!--
  Describe what the feature should do.  Bullet points are welcome.
  If this is a faithful port of an original mechanic, say so explicitly
  and link the behavioural reference.
-->

## Draft acceptance criteria (REQUIRED)

<!--
  At least one Given / When / Then row.  These get refined by the
  planner gate but a starting list is required so reviewers can scope
  the work.
-->

* **AC-?-???** GIVEN ... WHEN ... THEN ...

## Out-of-scope notes

<!--
  Anything explicitly NOT proposed here?  Listing the boundary helps
  reviewers split a large idea into smaller PRs.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
  Other ways to satisfy the motivation, and why this proposal beats them.
-->

## Pass placement (optional)

<!--
  Which pass do you think this belongs in?  See AGENTS.md and the plan
  for the current pass list.  If you don't know, leave blank and the
  triage will assign it.
-->

Pass:
